# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: AI-assisted CodeGrind: New Problem-Solving Help & Sign-In Enhancements
- Summary: Highlighting the Azure OpenAI-enabled AI assistant and Google authentication update, plus a quick tour of improved problem-solving guidance within CodeGrind.

- Content kind: image

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now features an Azure OpenAI-powered AI assistant for problem‑solving guidance and a streamlined login with Google authentication, enhancing secure access and learning efficiency without leaving the editor.
- CTA: Try the new AI assistant in the editor and sign in with Google to unlock personalized progress tracking today.
- Visual brief: A short screen-recorded walkthrough: showing the CodeGrind editor with the AI assistant panel, an example problem being solved, live AI hints, and the Google sign-in flow, concluding with a quick recap of features and a CTA to log in.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
